title: Gurdwara Baba Bakala Sahib
tagline: Gurdwara Baba Bakala Sahib — heritage city of Punjab

overview.short: Gurdwara Baba Bakala Sahib (Punjabi: ਗੁਰਦੁਆਰਾ ਬਾਬਾ ਬਕਾਲ਼ਾ ਸਾਹਿਬ) is a prominent Sikh Gurdwara in Baba Bakala, Punjab, India which is about 42 km from Amritsar.
overview.description: Gurdwara Baba Bakala Sahib (Punjabi: ਗੁਰਦੁਆਰਾ ਬਾਬਾ ਬਕਾਲ਼ਾ ਸਾਹਿਬ) is a prominent Sikh Gurdwara in Baba Bakala, Punjab, India which is about 42 km from Amritsar. It is known for its association with the 9th Sikh Guru, Guru Tegh Bahadur, Mata Ganga and Baba Makhan Shah Lubana. The main complex contains 4 Gurdwaras. The Gurdwara's Sarovar is located on the left hand-side of the bazaar leading up to the main Gurdwara complex.

topPlaces.name: Sathiala
topPlaces.description: Sathiala is a village located in the Amritsar District, in the Indian state of Punjab. It is located 5 km from Beas.

topPlaces.name: Baba Bakala
topPlaces.description: Baba Bakala is a historical town and tehsil in the Amritsar district in Punjab, India. It is known as the location of Gurdwara Baba Bakala Sahib.

topPlaces.name: Budha Theh
topPlaces.description: Budha Theh is a census town in Amritsar district in the state of Punjab, India.

topPlaces.name: Rayya, Amritsar
topPlaces.description: Rayya is a city and municipality in Amritsar district in the Indian state of Punjab. Rayya is about 35 km from Amritsar, 45 km from Jalandhar and 5 km from the Beas River.

topPlaces.name: Beas City
topPlaces.description: Beas is a riverside city in the Amritsar district of the Indian state of Punjab, 43 km from Amritsar city, the district headquarters. It has a population of 55,295: 28,921 male and 26,374 female.

topPlaces.name: Budha Theh, Kapurthala
topPlaces.description: Budha Theh is a village in Kapurthala district of Punjab State, India. It is located 20 kilometres (12 mi) from Kapurthala, which is both district and sub-district headquarters of Budha Theh.

topPlaces.name: Bhaini
topPlaces.description: Bhaini is a village in Phillaur in Jalandhar district of Punjab State, India. It is located 6 kilometres (3.7 mi) from sub district headquarters and 50 kilometres (31 mi) from district headquarters.

topPlaces.name: Gurmukh Singhwala
topPlaces.description: Gurmukh Singhwala is a village in Kapurthala district of Punjab State, India. It is located 17 kilometres (11 mi) from Kapurthala, which is both district and sub-district headquarters of Gurmukh Singhwala.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Gurdwara Baba Bakala Sahib?
faq.a: The best time to visit Gurdwara Baba Bakala Sahib is Oct – Mar. Summers are 28–44°C and winters are 8–25°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Gurdwara Baba Bakala Sahib?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Sri Guru Ram Dass Jee International Airport, Amritsar (47 km) and the nearest railway station is Amritsar Junction (39 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Gurdwara Baba Bakala Sahib?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Gurdwara Baba Bakala Sahib at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Gurdwara Baba Bakala Sahib?
faq.a: Stays in Gurdwara Baba Bakala Sahib start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Gurdwara Baba Bakala Sahib?
faq.a: The top attractions are Sathiala, Baba Bakala, Budha Theh, Rayya, Amritsar, Beas City.
